headline: Why Is Johnson Controls (JCI) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of building operations company Johnson Controls (NYSE:JCI) jumped 6% in the afternoon session after UBS raised its price target on the stock to $180 from $170 while maintaining a Buy rating, following a company event.

headline: Sensormatic Solutions Expands Options for Sewn-in RFID Source Tagging Strategies
summary: NEUHAUSEN, Switzerland, June 02, 2026--Sensormatic Solutions, the leading global retail solutions portfolio of Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), now offers two discreet radio-frequency identification (RFID) tagging alternatives for clothing, apparel and accessory for brands and retailers seeking deep insights without compromising garments’ look and feel. Its new RFID Seam Tag and RFID Brand Label—which are now available to retailers worldwide—can be sewn directly into garments without altering fit,

headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Johnson Controls Intl, Raises Price Target to $180
